The Celebrations

✦
💍
Engagement
12 May · 11:00 AM
Two families come together in joy. Exchange of rings, warmth of laughter, and the beautiful beginning of a shared journey.
🌸
Haldi & Sangeet
12 May · 5:00 PM
Golden turmeric and music fill the air. An evening of dance, song, and celebrations that will be remembered always.
🕉️
Vaidik Ceremony
13 May · 10:00 AM
Ancient Vedic rituals, sacred fire, and the blessings of elders as the couple prepares for their eternal union.
🌺
Wedding Ceremony
13 May · 7:30 PM ✦ Muhurtham
Under starlight and marigold, two souls become one. Saat Phere, sacred vows, dinner and a night of pure celebration.
